title: Test 3min — Hume Octave (~$14/mo tier, built-in voices)
description: Engine A/B test, identical script. Engine: Hume Octave 2 with built-in voices (Ava Song / Sebastian Lockwood / Terrence Bentley / Donovan Sinclair). Note: not voice-matched to Foundry characters — testing engine quality only. To match characters, would need ~15min cloning per voice.
